name: singlewebsite
description: Locked-down single-site browser shell for Windows

scripts.skill:pack:study-helper: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force dist\\openclaw-skills | Out-Null; Remove-Item dist\\openclaw-skills\\study-helper.zip -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Compress-Archive -Path skills\\study-helper -DestinationPath dist\\openclaw-skills\\study-helper.zip -Force"
scripts.skill:publish:study-helper: npx clawhub publish skills/study-helper --slug study-helper --name "学习助手" --version 1.2.4 --changelog "学习助手更新：继续从对话里提取科目、日期和多张作业图片；同时移除智能体删除作业接口，只保留创建与查询。" --tags latest
